prompt: A cleanly colored manga page in a modern romantic-comedy style, presented as a 6-panel comic layout with crisp black panel borders on a white page. The scene takes place outdoors on a bright day with blue sky, soft clouds, leafy green trees, paved walkway, and queue posts with chain barriers. The main subject is a teenage anime girl with a short blond bob haircut, loose windblown strands, large golden-brown eyes, light blush, and a serious slightly embarrassed expression. She wears a floppy dog-ear hat with cream fur and a small blue polka-dot cap detail, a blue school-style cardigan or blazer over a white shirt, and a red patterned necktie, while holding a pink swirled soft-serve ice cream cone. A teenage boy in a dark blue sweater and white collared shirt appears in 3 panels, his face obscured by a soft rectangular blur, also wearing a matching floppy dog-ear hat. The page should have exactly 6 panels: 2 small panels across the top row, 1 large central close-up panel spanning the width, and 3 panels along the bottom row. Top-left panel: the boy faces forward with the girl turning sharply toward him, her hair and hat flaring from motion, outdoor background with a signboard, and hand-drawn manga sound effects in black. Top-right panel: a small chibi-style version of the girl stands near the chain barrier, looking smug and flustered while holding the ice cream, with a speech bubble that says "THAT'S A LOOK OF ACCOMPLISHMENT." and small floating sound-effect text near her head. Center panel: a dramatic close-up portrait of the girl against open sky, hair blowing across her face, one strand crossing her mouth, dog ears visible, staring forward with a calm, stunned look; include a vertical speech bubble on the right with Japanese text and a small English sound effect reading "PLOP". Bottom-left panel: the boy, face blurred, speaking with a speech bubble that says "I'VE BEEN THINKING THIS FOR A WHILE, BUT..." Bottom-middle panel: the girl in side view lifting a hand toward her mouth while holding the pink ice cream in the other hand, with a speech bubble saying "THANKS." Bottom-right panel: the boy reaches toward the girl's mouth or cheek with his hand as if wiping off cream, with a speech bubble that says "YOU GOT SOME CREAM OVER HERE." Keep all visible comic text and sound effects integrated into the art, including "WAH!", "FWSH", and the English dialogue. Use polished manga coloring over inked line art: soft cel shading, slightly textured watercolor-like fills, warm skin tones, glossy eyes, fine crosshatching accents, and expressive linework. Emphasize romantic tension, wind movement, and the contrast between comedic chibi reaction and tender close-up drama.
